steps.title: Identify the dual requirement
steps.content: To “present the study and its findings,” the statement must include both the research (researcher, study) and the result (74 species). This is the criterion for effectiveness.

steps.title: Apply the criterion to the choices
steps.content:
Choice A satisfies both: it identifies the researcher and study, then states the finding (74 species) with location context.

The other three fail—B and C omit the researcher and study identification entirely, while D includes the study but omits the finding (74 species).

That is the correct answer.
